SEARCH
Package clientGui.reservation

Class GetTableController

java.lang.Object
clientGui.navigation.MainNavigator
clientGui.reservation.GetTableController
All Implemented Interfaces:
MessageListener<Object>, BaseController
public class GetTableController extends clientGui.navigation.MainNavigator implements MessageListener<Object>
Controller for retrieving a table using a confirmation code. Also displays active orders for subscribers.

  • Method Details

    • initData

      public void initData(ClientUi clientUi, CustomerType isSubscriberStatus, Integer subCode, Customer customer)
      Initializes the controller with customer and session data.
      Parameters:
      clientUi - The client UI instance
      isSubscriberStatus - The customer type
      subCode - The subscriber code
      customer - The customer object

    • loadSubscriberOrders

      private void loadSubscriberOrders()
      Loads active orders for the subscriber.

    • checkTableAvailability

      void checkTableAvailability(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
      Handles the "Get Table" button click. Validates the confirmation code and attempts to retrieve the table.
      Parameters:
      event - The action event

    • processCodeCheck

      private void processCodeCheck(String codeStr)
      Processes the table retrieval request using the provided confirmation code.
      Parameters:
      codeStr - The confirmation code as a string

    • openLostCodePopup

      void openLostCodePopup(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
      Opens a popup to help the user retrieve a lost confirmation code.
      Parameters:
      event - The action event

    • goBack

      void goBack(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
      Navigates back to the Subscriber Option screen.
      Parameters:
      event - The action event

    • onMessageReceive

      public void onMessageReceive(Object msg)
      Handles messages from the server. Processes table retrieval responses and lists of orders.
      Specified by:
      onMessageReceive in interface MessageListener<Object>
      Parameters:
      msg - The message object

    • handleOrderResponse

      private void handleOrderResponse(Response res)
      Handles the response containing a list of subscriber orders.

    • handleTableResponse

      private void handleTableResponse(Response res)
      Handles the response for table retrieval. Displays the table number if successful.

    • createOrderButton

      private javafx.scene.control.Button createOrderButton(Order o)
      Creates a button for each order in the list. Clicking the button automatically fills in the confirmation code.
      Parameters:
      o - The order object
      Returns:
      The created button
